narration: Unique Paths fills a grid where each cell stores how many ways can reach it.
callout: The first row and first column start as 1 because there is only one straight path there.

narration: Every inside cell adds the path count from above and the path count from the left.
decision: That rule works because the robot can only move down or right.

predictionPrompt.prompt: Which two cells help fill an inside cell in Unique Paths?

choices.label: The top cell and the left cell
choices.feedback: Correct. Those are the only two ways to enter the cell.

choices.label: The bottom cell and the right cell
choices.feedback: Not this one. The robot has not reached those cells yet.

narration: Once the smaller cells are filled, the bottom-right answer becomes easy to read.
callout: Grid DP is still just smaller answers helping bigger ones.
